expectations.text: Report contains all 5 category sections: AEO, GEO, SEO Technical, SEO On-Page, Structured Data
expectations.evidence: All 5 categories present with full check tables, summaries, and fix lists: AEO (77.6), GEO (46.4), SEO Technical (66.7), SEO On-Page (47.9), Structured Data (0.0).

expectations.text: Report contains an AI Crawler Policy section with training/retrieval bot analysis and a strategy grade
expectations.evidence: Full bot table with 14 bots, type classification (Training/Retrieval), status per bot, and Strategy grade: B — Permissive.

expectations.text: Report includes indexability checks (noindex, soft 404, canonical)
expectations.evidence: IDX checks embedded in SEO Technical section results table.

expectations.text: Report shows multiple pages were crawled (not just the homepage) — at least 3 distinct URLs
expectations.evidence: Report states 'Pages crawled: 10'. Evidence references specific pages: /careers, /research, /news, /product/claude-code, /claude/opus, /claude/sonnet.

expectations.text: Scores and grades are present for each category and overall, following the A+/A/B+/B/C+/C/D/F scale
expectations.evidence: Overall: 51.5/100 (F). All 5 categories scored with letter grades matching the scale.

expectations.text: Check results include specific evidence (actual values found, not just PASS/FAIL)
expectations.evidence: Evidence column populated throughout: 'LCP: 8283ms (POOR)', '6 of 10 pages share identical boilerplate meta description', 'No visible author attribution on any crawled page'.

expectations.text: Report ends with a priority fix list ordered by severity
expectations.evidence: Per-category fix lists with Critical first, then Important, then Nice to have. Top 3 overall fixes also listed.
